hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); RES=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('block' if 'rm -rf' in d.get('command','') else 'ok')" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$RES" == 'block' ]] && { echo 'rm -rf is blocked. Use rm -r or delete specific files.' >&2; exit 2; } || true

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *".env.local"* ]] && echo '{"block": true, "message": "Cannot write to .env.local directly."}' >&2 || true

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$file" && -f "$file" ]]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; fi

echo '=== TripMind Dev Session ===' && echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'not a git repo')" && echo "Status: $(git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') files changed" && echo 'MVP Checklist: .claude/MVP_CHECKLIST.md'
